common.loadError: ERP-Lite could not load this screen completely. Review tenant finance setup and ERP-Lite reference data, then try again.

home.title: Finance & Accounting
home.subtitle: Operational cockpit for ERP-Lite readiness, periods, posting, and controls.

governance.title: Binding & templates
governance.body: Template application and governance assignment are managed from the platform console. Use Finance Readiness to confirm the tenant is aligned before posting.

readiness.title: Finance Readiness
readiness.description: Template status, governance assignment, and mapping gaps.

usageMaps.title: Usage maps
usageMaps.description: Map usage codes to accounts for automated posting.

periods.title: Periods
periods.description: Open and close accounting periods with prechecks.

coa.title: Chart of accounts
coa.description: Tenant account master and posting flags.

journals.title: Journal register
journals.description: List journals and open detail in GL.

reports.title: Financial reports
reports.description: Balances and statement views from posted data.

postingAudit.title: Posting audit
postingAudit.description: Posting log and journal creation history.

financeActions.title: Finance control audit
financeActions.description: Read-only log of period and control actions.

setup.title: Setup guide
setup.description: Step-by-step links through ERP-Lite go-live tasks.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.subtitle: Journal-driven finance inquiry derived only from posted ERP-Lite journals.

gl.title: General Ledger Inquiry
gl.subtitle: Latest posted journal lines for the current tenant.
gl.emptyHint: Adjust your filters or post transactions to see entries here.

trialBalance.title: Trial Balance
trialBalance.subtitle: Balances derived from posted journal entries only.

profitAndLoss.title: Profit and Loss
profitAndLoss.subtitle: Revenue and expense balances derived from posted journals.
profitAndLoss.empty: No profit and loss balances found.

balanceSheet.title: Balance Sheet
balanceSheet.subtitle: Asset, liability, and equity balances derived from posted journals.

arAging.title: AR Aging
arAging.subtitle: Open customer invoices with successful ERP-Lite posting, grouped by aging bucket.
arAging.empty: No open posted receivable balances found.

access.upgradeTitle: This ERP-Lite module is not enabled
access.upgradeDescription: Your current plan or published platform policy does not enable this ERP-Lite area yet.
access.deniedTitle: You do not have access to this ERP-Lite module
access.deniedDescription: Ask your tenant administrator to grant the required ERP-Lite permission for this area.

coa.title: Chart of Accounts
coa.subtitle: Manage the tenant chart of accounts that ERP-Lite posting, mapping, and reporting consume at runtime.

account.title: Create Account
account.subtitle: Create a tenant account under the HQ-governed account type and group structure.

hints.codeStandard: Use a governed 6-digit numeric account code such as 100000, 110000, 111000, or 111001.
hints.parentRule: Choose a non-postable parent that explicitly allows tenant child accounts. Child code depth must match the parent hierarchy.

accounts.title: Tenant Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Live tenant chart of accounts with type, group, hierarchy, and control flags.
accounts.errorEmpty: Accounts could not be loaded for this tenant.

shell.title: Phase 1 shell is ready
shell.description: This section is enabled for platform wiring, permissions, and navigation. Finance runtime logic will arrive in the next implementation phases.

coa.title: Chart of Accounts
coa.subtitle: Set up the governed account structure that later finance posting and reporting will use.

gl.title: General Ledger
gl.subtitle: Review the shell for tenant-facing ledger inquiry and posting controls before the finance engine is implemented.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.subtitle: Prepare the reporting space for trial balance, profit and loss, balance sheet, and finance inquiry screens.

ar.title: AR Aging
ar.subtitle: Reserve the receivables workspace for customer balances, aging buckets, and follow-up review.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Reserve the expense and petty cash workspace for the basic v1 cost-control flows.

bankRecon.title: Bank Reconciliation
bankRecon.subtitle: Reserve the future bank matching and reconciliation workspace for the v2 treasury phase.

ap.title: Accounts Payable
ap.subtitle: Reserve the supplier payable workspace for v2 invoice, payment, and aging flows.

po.title: Purchase Orders
po.subtitle: Reserve the procurement workspace for supplier ordering and receipt controls planned for v2.

branchPl.title: Branch P&L
branchPl.subtitle: Branch profitability combines direct posted finance truth with the latest posted governed allocation run, while costing remains visible as a separate audited layer.

list.title: Branch Profitability
list.subtitle: This view preserves direct finance truth, then layers the latest posted governed allocation run on top of it.
list.empty: No posted branch profitability data found.

allocationRule.title: Create Allocation Rule
allocationRule.subtitle: Define a governed branch profitability allocation rule without hiding direct finance truth.

allocationRun.title: Create Allocation Run
allocationRun.subtitle: Open a draft allocation run before adding branch allocation lines.

allocationLine.title: Add Allocation Line
allocationLine.subtitle: Capture an auditable manual allocation line into a draft run.

costComponent.title: Create Cost Component
costComponent.subtitle: Define the approved laundry cost component catalog for rerunnable cost runs.

costRun.title: Create Cost Run
costRun.subtitle: Open a draft cost run before loading detailed cost rows.

costRunDetail.title: Add Cost Run Detail
costRunDetail.subtitle: Record audited costing detail rows into a draft cost run.

allocationRules.title: Allocation Rules
allocationRules.subtitle: Active profitability allocation rules available for new draft runs.

allocationRuns.title: Allocation Runs
allocationRuns.subtitle: Draft and posted branch profitability allocation runs.

costRuns.title: Cost Runs
costRuns.subtitle: Draft and posted laundry cost runs with auditable totals.

costSummary.title: Latest Cost Summary
costSummary.subtitle: Branch totals from the latest posted cost run.

expenses.title: Basic Expenses and Petty Cash
expenses.subtitle: Record simple operating expenses, manage petty cash boxes, and keep the operational cash trail aligned with governed ERP-Lite posting.

notices.expense-created: Expense saved and queued through ERP-Lite posting.
notices.expense-created-post-failed: Expense saved, but finance posting failed and entered the exception path.
notices.expense-created-post-skipped: Expense saved, but auto-post policy was not active for this event.
notices.cash-txn-created: Petty cash transaction saved and queued through ERP-Lite posting.
notices.cash-txn-post-failed: Petty cash transaction saved, but finance posting failed and entered the exception path.
notices.cash-txn-post-skipped: Petty cash transaction saved, but auto-post policy was not active for this event.
notices.cash-recon-exception-created: Petty cash reconciliation exception created successfully.

expense.title: Record Expense
expense.subtitle: Basic v1 expense entry. This flow currently supports cash or bank settlement only.

cashbox.title: Create Cash Box
cashbox.subtitle: Create an operational petty cash box linked to the governed petty cash account mapping.

help.code: Leave blank to generate the next petty cash code automatically.

cashTxn.title: Record Petty Cash Movement
cashTxn.subtitle: Top-up or spend from an existing petty cash box. Posting remains non-blocking and governed by HQ policy.

approval.title: Request Approval
approval.subtitle: Create an advanced approval step for an expense or petty cash document.

cashRecon.title: Create Cash Reconciliation
cashRecon.subtitle: Capture counted petty cash against the expected cashbox balance.

cashReconException.title: Record Reconciliation Exception
cashReconException.subtitle: Log a shortage, overage, or other audited petty cash variance.

expenses.title: Recent Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Latest recorded expense documents for the current tenant.

cashboxes.title: Petty Cash Boxes
cashboxes.subtitle: Operational cash boxes with running balances derived from petty cash transactions.
cashboxes.empty: No petty cash boxes created yet.

cashTxns.title: Recent Petty Cash Transactions
cashTxns.subtitle: Latest petty cash top-up and spend entries.
cashTxns.empty: No petty cash transactions recorded yet.

approvals.title: Approval Queue
approvals.subtitle: Recent advanced approval requests for ERP-Lite expense and petty cash documents.

cashRecons.title: Petty Cash Reconciliations
cashRecons.subtitle: Recent petty cash reconciliation headers with expected and counted balances.
cashRecons.empty: No petty cash reconciliations created yet.

ap.title: Suppliers and Accounts Payable
ap.subtitle: Manage supplier setup, AP invoices, and AP payments on the tenant runtime foundation prepared for Phase 9.

notices.ap-payment-created: AP payment created and allocated successfully.

supplier.title: Create Supplier
supplier.subtitle: Create a supplier master record with optional branch and AP control account linkage.

invoice.title: Create AP Invoice
invoice.subtitle: Record a supplier invoice and open it for AP settlement.

payment.title: Create AP Payment
payment.subtitle: Settle one open AP invoice by bank or petty cash settlement source.

suppliers.title: Recent Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Latest active suppliers for this tenant.

invoices.title: Recent AP Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Latest AP invoices with current open balances.

payments.title: Recent AP Payments
payments.subtitle: Latest AP settlements created for this tenant.

aging.title: AP Aging
aging.subtitle: Open AP invoices grouped by overdue bucket.

po.title: Purchase Orders
po.subtitle: Create supplier purchase orders on the tenant V2 procurement foundation.

po.title: Create Purchase Order
po.subtitle: Create a simple one-line purchase order ready for later receiving and AP traceability.

po.title: Recent Purchase Orders
po.subtitle: Latest supplier purchase orders for this tenant.

bankRecon.title: Bank Accounts and Reconciliation
bankRecon.subtitle: Maintain bank accounts, statement batches, and reconciliation headers for the Phase 9 treasury foundation.

bankAccount.title: Create Bank Account
bankAccount.subtitle: Link a tenant bank account to the governed GL bank account.

statement.title: Create Statement Batch
statement.subtitle: Register a bank statement header before statement-line import or matching.

statementLine.title: Create Statement Line
statementLine.subtitle: Add a manual statement line for matching and reconciliation review.

statementImport.title: Bulk Import Statement Lines
statementImport.subtitle: Paste one statement line per row using the approved pipe-separated format.

match.title: Create Bank Match
match.subtitle: Link an unmatched statement line to a posted AP payment and optional reconciliation header.

recon.title: Create Reconciliation
recon.subtitle: Open a reconciliation header for a bank account and statement period.

bankAccounts.title: Recent Bank Accounts
bankAccounts.subtitle: Latest active bank accounts for this tenant.

statements.title: Recent Statement Batches
statements.subtitle: Latest imported or manual bank statement batches.
statements.empty: No bank statement batches created yet.

recons.title: Recent Reconciliations
recons.subtitle: Latest bank reconciliation headers for this tenant.

statementLines.title: Recent Statement Lines
statementLines.subtitle: Latest statement lines ready for matching review.

matches.title: Recent Matches
matches.subtitle: Latest confirmed and reversed bank matches.

journals.title: Journal register
journals.subtitle: Recent journals for this tenant. Open a row to view lines in General Ledger.

setup.title: ERP-Lite setup guide
setup.subtitle: Track go-live steps locally on this device. Links open existing ERP-Lite screens.
setup.persistHint: Progress is stored in this browser only (localStorage).

readiness.title: Finance readiness
readiness.description: Confirm governance assignment, template apply status, and mapping health.

periods.title: Periods
periods.description: Ensure an open accounting period exists for posting.

gl.title: General ledger
gl.description: Validate posted activity and journal detail.

financeActions.title: Finance control audit
financeActions.subtitle: Read-only history of control actions such as period close (org_fin_post_action_tr).
financeActions.empty: No finance control actions recorded yet.

readiness.title: Finance Readiness
readiness.subtitle: Check your tenant finance setup health before going live with automated posting.

alerts.noGovAssignment: No governance package is assigned to this tenant. Posting will fail until a package is assigned by platform admin.

usageMaps.title: Usage Mapping Console
usageMaps.subtitle: Map usage codes to tenant accounts for automated journal posting.
usageMaps.banner: Align usage maps with Finance Readiness and the ERP-Lite home cockpit. Required codes with issues block clean posting.

exceptions.title: Exception Workbench
exceptions.subtitle: Review and resolve open posting exceptions.
exceptions.empty: No open exceptions. Posting is clean.

periods.title: Period Management
periods.subtitle: Manage accounting periods that control posting eligibility.

precheck.blocked: Period cannot be closed until blockers are resolved.

close.confirmBody: Review the checklist below before closing.

postAudit.title: Posting Audit Viewer
postAudit.subtitle: View all posting log entries and journal creation history.
